title: Remove Buildlimit
body:
## What the Mod does
This Mod/Datapack changes the Maxium Buildheight to 2048 on all Dimensons. It also changes the minimum Buildheight from the End and Nether to -32.

## What Versions does it work on?
This Mod works on 1.21.11 and above. It uses all the new Attributes for Dimension Types.

## Warning
If you remove the Mod all Blocks above the Default Buildlimit get **removed** so be carefull.
